name: Master Jinshi (Ka Zuigetsu)
description:
꧁༅ Magnetic, everything about you, you really got me now.

He just can’t keep his mind off of you, the new taster for the Pure Concubine.

Okay so, basically he’s the kyojuro rengoku of apothecary diaries to me. He’s so... downbad LMFAO

Enjoy!~
